meta.title: Anthony Kuiau — Graphic Designer & Radio Presenter
meta.description: Anthony Kuiau is a Graphic Designer and Radio Presenter based in Port Moresby, Papua New Guinea.

about.heading: Crafting stories through design & sound.
paragraphs: I'm Anthony Kuiau, a Graphic Designer and Radio Presenter based in Port Moresby, Papua New Guinea. I blend visual storytelling with broadcast media to create memorable brand experiences.
With hands-on experience across Adobe Creative Suite and live radio production, I help brands communicate clearly and compellingly — whether on air or on screen.

items.title: Brand Identity System
items.description: Full brand identity including logo, colour palette, and guidelines.

items.title: FM100 Social Campaign
items.description: Digital and promotional materials for FM100 audience engagement.

items.title: Logo & Mark
items.description: Logo design and brand mark for a local PNG client.

items.title: Packaging Design
items.description: Product packaging design for a PNG brand.

timeline.title: Programs Officer — Radio Presenter
timeline.desc: Worked across FM100 & HOT97FM delivering live radio content while creating digital and promotional materials to support audience engagement and brand growth across broadcast and social media platforms.

timeline.title: Graphic Designer
timeline.desc: Designed logos and branding materials for local PNG clients, gaining hands-on experience across Adobe Illustrator and Photoshop on diverse branding and print projects.

contact.heading:

together.
contact.body: Have a project in mind? I'd love to hear about it.
